passiveAbilities.name: Trickster
passiveAbilities.description: When this model successfully bluffs, after resolving the effect you may reveal the bluff and gain +3 energy.

passiveAbilities.name: Shifter
passiveAbilities.description: This character may Jog over Water Features and Wooded Patches.

arcaneAbilities.name: Mimic
arcaneAbilities.description:
Choose another model within 8", this model gains one of its keywords until end of turn.
This character, or a model within 4" which shares a keyword with this character, gains +1 energy.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Cunning
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds, then if the target shares a keyword with this character move it X-1".
Target suffers X Magical Dmg, then if the target shares a keyword with this character move it X"
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Duplicity
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If there is a model within 4" that did not participate in this round of melee and shares a keyword with this character, reduce Dmg suffered to W. Swap positions with a model within 4" that did not participate in this round of melee and shares a keyword with this character.
